title: aphanes neglecta
intro: Aphanes neglecta, also known as downy parsley, is a small, annual plant belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae) that is native to Europe and Western Asia. The medicinal properties of Aphanes neglecta include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds, which are believed to have potential health benefits. The health benefits associated with this plant include its ability to support digestive health and reduce inflammation, as well as its potential to act as an antiseptic and antimicrobial agent. Aphanes neglecta can be prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, and its leaves and flowers can be used fresh or dried for medicinal purposes.
